Notice Of Motion For Order Requiring Respondents To Rescind Ordinance

MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER JACKIE PIERI, SMALL PROPERTY OWNERS OF SAN FRANCISCO, INC.'S Notice Of Motion For Order Requiring Respondents To Rescind Ordinance IS OFF CALENDAR PER MOVING PARTY PURSUANT TO 6/14/05 STIPULATION. Judge James L. Warren, Reporter Christina Paxton CSR# 1558 (301/JLW/EH)

Motion For Order Denying Automatic Stay Of Writ Of Mandate On Appeal
Off Calendar Jun-27-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Andrew Zacks, Esq. of Zacks, Utrecht & Leadbetter, 415-956-8100 for petitoner and moving party Jack Pieri.
Vince Chhabria, Esq., Deputy City Attorney, 415-554-4674 for respondent and opposing party City and County of San Francisco.

RULING:
ARGUED AND THE COURT TOOK UNDER SUBMISSION PETITIONER JACKIE PIERI, SMALL PROPERTY OWNERS OF SAN FRANCISCO, INC.'S Motion For Order Denying Automatic Stay Of Writ Of Mandate On Appeal. Counsels submitted proposed forms of orders in open court. Judge James L. Warren, Reporter Christina Paxton CSR# 1558. (301/JLW/EH)

Mtn To Strike First Amended Complt
Off Calendar May-26-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: RESPONDENT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S Motion To Strike First Amended Complaint IS OFF CALENDAR PER STIPULATION AND ORDER FILED ON MAY 25, 2005. (301/JLW/EH) Reporter: CHRISTINA PAXTON CSR# 1558

Alternative Writ Of Mandate And Motion For Stay Of Enforcement Of San Francisco Ordinance #21-05 (Ellis Act Relocation Ordinance)
Off Calendar Apr-25-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Andrew M. Zacks, Esq., and Mr. Krauss, Esq., Zacks, Utrecht & Leadbetter, 415-956-8100, for petitioner and moving party Jackie Pieri
Vince Chhabria, Deputy City Attorney and Wayne K. Snodgrass, Deputy City Attorney, 415-554-4675, for respondent and opposing party City and County of San Francisco

RULING:
A R G U E D; Petitioner's request for ALTERNATIVE WRIT OF MANDATE AND MOTION FOR STAY OF ENFORCEMENT OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDINANCE #21-05 (ELLIS ACT RELOCATION ORDINANCE) is taken UNDER SUBMISSION. The court asked for statements of decisions/proposed orders from both counsel by 5PM 3/24/05. (301/JLW/eh) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
